name: Rusted Muzzle
descs:
When hitting and dealing 12+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict 2 [Laceration] Potency.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 4 [Laceration] Potency instead.

When hitting and dealing 12+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 5 [Laceration] Potency instead.

Whenever an ally deals 1+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 5 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count instead.
